title: To Add or to Multiply
query: Design the shortest a-C-m program to map input ranges to output ranges using add and multiply operations.

title: Affine Mess
query: Check if a sequence of affine transformations (scaling, translation, rotation) could transform a drawing's control points.

title: Ancient Messages
query: Identify which of the six hieroglyph symbols (Ankh, Wedjat, Djed, Scarab, Was, Akeht) is represented in the given input.

title: Chips Challenge
query: Place the maximum number of widgets on an N×N chip grid, respecting disabled and pre‑occupied slots, while ensuring each row and column contains the same number of total components and no row/column exceeds a given fraction of the total components.

title: Coffee Central
query: On a city grid with known coffee‑shop locations, find the intersection from which the greatest number of shops can be reached within a fixed Manhattan walking distance.

title: Machine Works
query: Schedule buying, operating, and selling of at‑most‑one machine at a time to maximize final profit, given each machine’s price, availability day, daily profit, and resale price.

title: Magic Sticks
query: From a stick divided into straight segments, select and fold subsets of segments into polygons (using each segment at most once) to maximize the total enclosed area.

title: Mining Your Own Business
query: Determine the smallest number of escape shafts to install at junctions of a mine tunnel graph so that after any single junction collapse all remaining junctions can still reach the surface, and count how many ways this minimum can be achieved.

title: Mummy Madness
query: Simulate a turn‑based chase on a grid where you move in eight directions or stay, and each mummy moves toward you by Euclidean distance; compute the number of steps until you are caught assuming optimal evasion.

title: Pyramids
query: Given a number of unit cubes, partition them into distinct pyramids (each height ≥ 2) using as few pyramids as possible, then maximize the sizes of the pyramids in descending order.

title: Trash Removal
query: Given a polygon, you may rotate it before dropping it straight down through a vertical chute of constant width. Find the minimum chute width that allows the polygon to pass through without rotating during the fall.

title: Asteroid Rangers
query: Given asteroid bases moving with constant linear velocities, count how many times the Euclidean minimum spanning tree (optimal communication network) changes over time, assuming each change interval is isolated and the optimal tree is unique.

title: Curvy Little Bottles
query: For a bottle formed by revolving a positive polynomial P(x) around the x‑axis from xlow to xhigh, compute the fill heights (distance from the bottom) where the volume reaches multiples of a given increment, limited to the first eight marks not exceeding the top.

title: Bus Tour
query: Find a route HQ → permutation of hotels → attraction → permutation of hotels → HQ such that the set of hotels visited in the first ⌊h/2⌋ positions of the outbound leg equals the set visited in the first ⌊h/2⌋ positions of the inbound leg, minimizing total travel distance.

title: Fibonacci Words
query: For the Fibonacci word defined by F(0)=0, F(1)=1, F(n)=F(n-1)F(n-2), count how many times a given binary pattern p occurs as a substring in F(n).

title: Infiltration
query: In a tournament where each pair of cells has a directed control edge, find the smallest set of cells to infiltrate such that every cell is either in the set or reachable from an infiltrated cell via outgoing edges (i.e., dominated).

title: Keys
query: Given an initial configuration of keys attached to rings and rings possibly connected, determine the minimum number of key attachments/detachments required to transfer a specified subset of keys to Brenda; among those solutions, minimize ring connections/disconnections so that each person ends with one connected group of keys and rings (or none if they have no keys).

title: Minimum Cost Flow
query: Construct a water transport system connecting source and destination junctions with minimal cost by adding pipes and plugs, avoiding flooding.

title: Room Service
query: Find the shortest path for a robot to touch all walls of a convex polygon and return to the start.

title: A Safe Bet
query: Determine if a safe is secure by checking if a missing mirror can be placed to allow laser detection.

title: Shortest Flight Path
query: Compute the shortest flight path between airports while staying within a maximum distance from the nearest airport.

title: Stacking Plates
query: Merge multiple properly ordered plate stacks into one with the minimum number of split and join operations.

title: Takeover Wars
query: Simulate a takeover war between two corporations to determine which can guarantee victory.

title: Self-Assembly
query: Given a set of square tile types with edge labels, decide whether they can self-assemble into an infinitely large structure.

title: Hey, Better Bettor
query: Compute the maximum expected profit from betting at a casino that refunds x% of losses, given each $1 bet pays $2 with win probability p.

title: Surely You Congest
query: Find the largest number of commuters that can simultaneously travel to downtown using only shortest paths without any two using the same road in the same direction at the same time.

title: Factors
query: For a given n, find the smallest integer k such that the number of distinct orderings of k's prime factors equals n.

title: Harvard
query: Assign variables to memory banks in a Harvard architecture to minimize the total number of memory references and BSR changes needed to execute a given program with loops.

title: Low Power
query: Assign 2nk batteries to n machines each with two chips (k batteries per chip). A chip's power is the minimum of its k batteries. Find the smallest possible d such that the two chips in every machine can have power outputs differing by at most d.

title: Map Tiles
query: Given a simple polygon and fixed-size axis-aligned rectangular tiles, compute the minimum number of tiles (placed at any real coordinates, axis‑aligned, non‑rotating) needed to cover the polygon.

title: Матрёша
query: From a line of dolls with integer sizes, reassemble them into matryoshka sets where each set consists of consecutive sizes starting at 1. Merging adjacent groups costs the number of dolls that must be opened. Find the minimum total number of openings required.

title: Pirate Chest
query: Choose an axis‑aligned rectangular chest with integer width and depth not exceeding given limits and any integer height. Submerge it in a pond with known bottom depths; water rises uniformly. Maximize the chest volume while its top stays strictly below the water surface.

title: Pollution Solution
query: Compute the area of intersection between a given polygon and a semicircle (the upper half of a circle) centered at the origin, representing the polluted region.

title: Up a Tree
query: Given the outputs of three tree traversal functions where the recursive calls were not renamed correctly, deduce the original tree (or determine if it is possible) from the traversal sequences.

title: Baggage
query: Reorder baggage bins using a cart that moves adjacent pairs to achieve all A bins before B bins.

title: Buffed Buffet
query: Maximize total taste of a meal with weight w by selecting discrete and continuous dishes with decaying taste rates.

title: Crane Balancing
query: Calculate the weight range a crane can lift without toppling, based on its cross-section polygon and load attachment point.

title: Game Strategy
query: Determine if Alice can force Bob to reach her chosen position in a game with optimal play from both players.

title: Maze Reduction
query: Determine sets of rooms in a maze that are indistinguishable based on exit count and corridor structure.

title: Messenger
query: Find the shortest delivery time for a package between two moving paths by optimizing pickup and delivery points.

title: Metal Processing Plant
query: Partition shipments into two groups to minimize the sum of their maximum pairwise distances.

title: Pachinko
query: Calculate the probability each target is hit by a ball launched from the top row of a grid with random bounces.

title: Sensor Network
query: Find the largest subset of sensors where each pair is within a given distance d.

title: Skiing
query: Maximize the number of targets a skier can pass over given lateral acceleration constraints.

title: Surveillance
query: Determine the minimum number of cameras needed to cover all walls of a convex polygon.

title: Wire Crossing
query: Find the minimal number of existing wires a new connection must cross to connect two points without passing through intersections.

title: Amalgamated Artichokes
query: 给定常数 p, a, b, c, d 和整数时间范围，按 price(k)=p·(sin(a·k+b)+cos(c·k+d)+2) 计算整数 k 的价格序列，求其中先高后低的两个价格的最大差值。

title: Asteroids
query: 给定两个不旋转的二维凸多边形及其恒定速度，求它们运动过程中重叠面积达到最大的时间。

title: Catering
query: 有 k 套餐饮设备和 n 个按时间排序的请求，每个请求需派一套设备到地点，设备可在请求间转移，移动费用已知且首个派遣也计费。求满足所有请求的最小总移动费用。

title: Cutting Cheese
query: 给定一个 100×100×100 的奶酪块和其中若干球形孔洞，要沿同一方向切成 s 片等重量切片，求每片厚度。

title: Evolution in Parallel
query: 给定若干化石 DNA 序列（字符 A/C/M）和现代物种序列。进化操作只能是在序列任意位置插入一个核苷酸。判断这些序列能否由两条并行的插入演化路径解释并最终到达现代物种。

title: Keyboarding
query: Determine the minimal number of strokes to type a text on a virtual keyboard with a cursor moving via arrow buttons, where each key press (including selection or Enter) counts as a stroke.

title: Pipe Stream
query: Estimate the flow speed of Flubber in a pipe by strategically knocking on it at intervals of at least 's' seconds to minimize the number of knocks required in the worst case.

title: Qanat
query: Place additional vertical shafts in a qanat system to minimize excavation costs, calculated as the sum of distances dirt is moved during construction.

title: Ship Traffic
query: Find the largest time interval during which a ferry can safely cross the Strait of Gibraltar without colliding with ships in parallel lanes.

title: Tile Cutting
query: Calculate the maximum number of distinct parallelogram tiles of a given area that can be cut from a rectangular tile under specific geometric constraints.

title: Tours
query: Determine valid numbers of bus companies that can equally assign roads to all round tours in a national park without favoritism.

title: Weather Report
query: Design a prefix-free encoding scheme for weather reports to minimize the expected number of transmitted bits, given daily weather probabilities.

title: Window Manager
query: Simulate a window manager for a smartphone screen, handling commands to open, close, resize, and move windows while respecting physical collision rules.

title: Balanced Diet
query: 丹尼买甜品需保持比例平衡，求最多能买多少更多。

title: Branch Assignment
query: 分配分支到子项目，使信使路径总距离最小。

title: Ceiling Function
query: Count how many distinct binary search tree shapes are formed by inserting each given sequence of numbers (from top to bottom layer) into an initially empty BST using standard insertion rules.

title: Clock Breaking
query: From a series of clock LCD observations over consecutive minutes (unknown start time), with some segments possibly stuck permanently on or off, determine which segments are definitely malfunctioning and which are definitely working.

title: Forever Young
query: Given age y and a lower bound l, find the largest base b such that the representation of y in base b uses only decimal digits 0‑9 and, when interpreted as a base‑10 number, is at least l.

title: Longest Rivers
query: In a river system where each confluence chooses the name of one incoming river, compute for each original river the best possible rank (1 = longest) it can achieve over all naming choices, treating equal lengths as sharing the best rank.

title: Oil
query: Given horizontal oil deposits (segments) with a y‑coordinate and x‑interval, place a vertical well (fixed x) from the surface down to maximize the total width of deposits it intersects.

title: Polygonal Puzzle
query: Place two simple polygons (allowing translation and rotation only) so that they touch without overlapping interiors, and maximize the length of their common boundary.

title: Road Times
query: Using known road lengths and some observed delivery times, with each road’s speed limit between 30‑60 km/h and trucks always taking the shortest‑distance route at that limit, derive the best possible travel‑time estimates for all other city pairs.

title: Spin Doctor
query: Choose real weights S and T to sort poll triples (ai, bi, ci) by ai·S+bi·T; assuming ties are ordered worst‑case, minimize the span (cluster size) of entries where ci is true.

title: String Theory
query: 给定一个由引号和非引号字符组成的字符串，按 k-引号的递归定义（两端各有 k 个引号，中间是非空的 k-1 引号序列，可由非引号字符分隔或包围），求它可能达到的最大嵌套层数。

title: Swap Space
query: 有若干硬盘，当前容量等于已存数据量，重格式化后容量会改变。可按任意顺序重格式化；重格式化某盘前必须把其数据搬到其他盘或额外盘，重格式化后可用新容量。求保证能完成全部重格式化所需购买的最小额外容量。

title: What Really Happened on Mars?
query: 给定多个任务，每个有到达时间、基础优先级和指令序列（计算、锁资源、解锁资源），以及资源的优先级上限。按优先级天花板协议模拟单处理器执行：任务可能因资源占用或高优先级上限资源被占用而阻塞，当前优先级会因阻塞关系提升，选择最高当前优先级且未阻塞的任务执行。

title: Airport Construction
query: Compute the longest possible straight-line landing strip within a polygon.

title: Get a Clue!
query: Deduce possible murder scenarios in a Cluedo game based on suggestions and evidence.

title: Mission Improbable
query: Maximize stolen crates while maintaining identical camera views of a 3D grid.

title: Money for Nothing
query: Choose producer and consumer companies to maximize profit from widget sales.

title: Need for Speed
query: Calculate the constant offset in Sheila's speedometer readings based on journey data.

title: Posterize
query: Minimize the sum of squared errors when posterizing the red channel of an image.

title: Replicate Replicate Rfplicbte
query: Find the smallest initial pattern that could result in a given final pattern after replication steps with errors.

title: Scenery
query: Determine if all photographic features can be captured within a day given their time windows.

title: Secret Chamber at Mount Rushmore
query: Verify if words match using given letter translation rules.

title: Son of Pipe Stream
query: Optimize Flubber and water flow through pipes to maximize a value function.

title: Tarot Sham Boast
query: Rank Tarot predictions by their likelihood of appearing as contiguous sequences in a random sequence.

title: Visual Python++
query: Given a character grid containing top-left and bottom-right corner markers of rectangular statement blocks, recover which corners form rectangles and their nesting structure, assuming the drawing is syntactically valid.

title: Catch the Plane
query: Plan a bus journey to maximize the probability of catching a plane, considering bus schedules and failure probabilities.

title: Comma Sprinkler
query: Apply Dr. Sprinkler's rules to add commas to a text based on word occurrences and sentence boundaries.

title: Conquer The World
query: Find the minimum cost to move armies to their target nations in a tree-structured network.

title: Gem Island
query: Compute the expected sum of the top r gem counts after d nights of gem splitting.

title: Getting a Jump on Crime
query: Find all buildings reachable from Robin's hideout with the minimum number of jumps, considering building heights.

title: Go with the Flow
query: Determine the line width that results in the longest river of spaces in a typeset text.

title: Panda Preserve
query: Determine the smallest wireless range for receivers at polygon vertices to cover the entire park.

title: Single Cut of Failure
query: Find the minimum number of line segments to cut all wires on a door to prevent intrusion.

title: Triangles
query: Count the number of triangles formed by a grid of points and edges in a given image.

title: Uncrossed Knight's Tour
query: Maximize the number of squares a knight can visit on a rectangular board without crossing its path.

title: Wireless is the New Fiber
query: Design a wireless network with minimal links while minimizing nodes with changed connection counts.

title: Azulejos
query: 给定两组瓷砖，每组瓷砖有价格和高度；每组内按价格非降排列，可任意调换同价瓷砖，判断能否配对使后排每个瓷砖高于前排，并给出排列。

title: Beautiful Bridges
query: Given a tree with weighted edges, compute the sum of weights along the path between two nodes for multiple queries.

title: Checks Post Facto
query: Reconstruct a valid initial Checkers board state from a sequence of moves, ensuring all moves follow the game's rules.

title: Circular DNA
query: Determine the optimal cut point in a circular DNA sequence to maximize the number of gene types with properly nested markers.

title: Dead-End Detector
query: Identify non-redundant dead-end signs on a road map based on specific criteria to minimize the number of signs.

title: Directing Rainfall
query: Determine the minimum number of tarp punctures needed to ensure rainwater reaches a vineyard, with some rain originating directly above it.

title: First of Her Name
query: Count the number of royal ladies whose names start with a given prefix string.

title: Hobson's Trains
query: For each station, determine the number of stations that can reach it in at most k legs in a directed graph where each node has exactly one outgoing edge.

title: Karel the Robot
query: Simulate the execution of a simplified Karel programming language to control a robot's movements and procedures.

title: Miniature Golf
query: Determine the smallest possible rank for each player after adjusting their scores with an unknown upper limit l.

title: Traffic Blights
query: Compute the probability that a car passes all traffic lights without stopping, given their red-green cycles.

title: Cardiology
query: 给定 r 行 c 列的卡片矩阵，每次根据秘密卡片所在列，按预先规定的顺序收起各列且该列必须第二个收起，再按行重新发牌；选择这些收列顺序，使所有卡片最终稳定到唯一位置，并让该位置尽量靠近中心。

title: The Cost of Speed Limits
query: 给定一棵带限速的树形道路网；若某路口相连道路限速不同，则该路口每条相邻道路都要装限速牌。可以付费提高道路限速，求最小化限速牌费用和提速费用之和。

title: Domes
query: 给定平面上若干点和一个目标左右顺序，相机视角为 180 度且可任意朝向；求在给定区域内，能拍到这些点且投影顺序为目标顺序的位置面积。

title: Gene Folding
query: 给定只含 A、C、G、T 的字符串；可在关于某个切口左右对称的位置折叠并合并相同字符，反复操作后求能得到的最短字符串长度。

title: Landscape Generator
query: 给定 n 个初始高度为 0 的点，执行若干区间加一、区间减一，以及三角形山丘或山谷式的区间增减操作，输出最终高度序列。

title: Ley Lines
query: 给定平面上一组无三点共线的点，以及一支有宽度的笔；求一条等宽直线带最多能覆盖多少个点。

title: Opportunity Cost
query: 给定 n 部手机的三项属性，数值越大越好；一部手机的代价是相对所有手机在各项属性上的不足量总和的最大值，求代价最小的手机。

title: QC QC
query: 交互题：n 台机器中好机器超过一半；每轮可安排每台机器测试一台并被另一台测试，好机器如实报告，坏机器可任意但对同一被测对象保持一致；要求在 12 轮内判定哪些机器是坏的。

title: Quests
query: 给定若干任务的经验值和目标等级，等级每满 v 经验提升一级；在低于目标等级完成可获得 c 倍经验，安排所有任务顺序使总经验最大。

title: 'S No Problem
query: 给定带权树形人行道，选择两个起点，让两台扫雪机沿边行走并覆盖每条边至少一次，最小化两台机器的总行驶距离。

title: Space Walls
query: 给定由单位立方体组成的空间站表面和若干机器人的起点与朝向；机器人每秒沿表面跨面移动并在棱处转向，求最早发生同面碰撞或交换位置碰撞的时间。

title: Sweep Stakes
query: 给定 m×n 网格每格独立布雷概率，并已知总雷数；在已知总雷数的条件下，对若干询问子集求其中雷数的概率分布。

title: Trailing Digits
query: 给定单件价格 b、目标尾数 d 和最高捆绑价格 a，选择正整数 k 使 kb≤a，并让 kb 的末尾连续 d 尽可能多。

title: What's Our Vector, Victor?
query: 给定一些已知向量，以及若干未知向量到这些已知向量的欧氏距离约束，重建满足这些距离条件的向量嵌入。

title: Which Planet is This?!
query: 给定两张球面地图上的经纬度点集，判断它们是否可能表示同一星球：纬度相同，经度可因星球自转发生整体平移。

title: Crystal Crosswind
query: 给定若干风向以及每个风向下观测到的晶体边界位置。边界位置满足该处有分子，而沿风向反方向一格没有分子。需要找出与所有观测一致、分子数量最少和最多的两种晶体结构。

title: Dungeon Crawler
query: 给定一棵带通行时间的树形地牢，每个询问给出起点 s、钥匙 k 和陷阱 t；玩家拿到钥匙前不能进入陷阱，并要访问所有房间，求最短探索时间。

title: Fair Division
query: 海盗围成一圈反复按同一个比例 f 取走剩余财宝；需要选择一个有理数 f∈(0,1)，使无限过程结束后每名海盗得到的总量都是整数。

title: Guardians of the Gallery
query: 给定一个简单多边形房间、守卫起点和圆形雕塑位置，求守卫在房间内移动到某点的最短距离，使从该点至少能看到雕塑的一半。

title: Hand of the Free Marked
query: 一副 n 张牌分成 m 种背面标记，随机抽 k 张；助手可隐藏其中一张并按顺序展示其余 k-1 张，魔术师还能看到背面标记，求最优策略下猜中隐藏牌的最大概率。

title: Islands from the Sky
query: 给定若干岛屿和若干三维直线飞行路线，飞机向下扫描的可见宽度由孔径角 θ 决定；求最小 θ，使每个岛屿能被某一次飞行完整拍摄到。

title: Mosaic Browsing
query: 给定带颜色和空格的 motif 以及彩色 mosaic 网格，找出 motif 在 mosaic 中所有可匹配的位置，空格可匹配任意颜色。

title: Prehistoric Programs
query: 给定若干写有左右括号序列的泥板，重新排列这些泥板，使拼接后的括号串是合法嵌套的括号序列。

title: Spider Walk
query: 给定蜘蛛网的径向线和相邻径向线之间的桥；从某条径向线向外走时遇到桥就必须横穿。对目标终点 s，求每个可能起点至少需新增多少座合法桥，才能使最终停在 s。

title: Splitstream
query: Given an acyclic network of split and merge nodes that processes the input sequence 1,2,…,m, answer queries asking for the k‑th number appearing at a specified output node.

title: Take On Meme
query: In a rooted tree where each leaf holds a 2‑D meme vector (x,y), each internal node combines its children by assigning weight +1 to the winning child and –1 to all others, summing the weighted vectors to produce a new vector. Choose winners at each node to maximize the squared Euclidean distance (x²+y²) of the final vector at the root.

title: Where Am I?
query: On an infinite grid with a finite set of marked cells, an explorer starts at an unknown cell and walks outward in a clockwise spiral, observing whether each visited cell is marked or empty. Determine the number of steps required until the observed pattern uniquely identifies the starting cell.

title: Riddle of the Sphinx
query: Determine the unknown non‑negative leg counts of three creatures by asking up to five queries, each returning the total legs of a chosen multiset of the creatures, knowing that at most one answer may be false.

title: Three Kinds of Dice
query: Given two dice D₁ and D₂ with D₁ having advantage over D₂, find a die D₃ that (i) minimizes score(D₃,D₂) among all D₃ with score(D₃,D₁) ≥ ½, and (ii) maximizes score(D₃,D₁) among all D₃ with score(D₂,D₃) ≥ ½, to test for an intransitive trio.

title: Carl’s Vacation
query: Compute the shortest surface distance between the apexes of two right square pyramids standing on a common plane, allowing travel on the pyramids’ lateral faces and the ground.

title: Turning Red
query: Each light is red, green, or blue and is incident to at most two buttons. Pressing a button cycles the colors of its incident lights (R→G→B→R). Find the minimum total number of button presses needed to make all lights red.

title: Bridging the Gap
query: A group of walkers with given crossing times must cross a bridge that holds at most C walkers at a time and requires the torch. A group moves at the speed of its slowest member. Find the shortest possible total time for all walkers to reach the far side.

title: Doing the Container Shuffle
query: n containers are randomly placed into two stacks (each container equally likely to be in either stack). Given a fixed pickup order, compute the expected number of moves needed to retrieve the containers when only the top container of a stack can be taken and containers may be shifted between stacks to expose the desired one.

title: Zoo Management
query: Each enclosure holds one animal type and enclosures are connected by tunnels. In a move you may select any set of animals and move each to an adjacent enclosure, provided the animal already there also moves as part of the same move and no tunnel is used more than once in that move. Determine whether a given target configuration can be reached from the initial configuration.

title: Toy Train Tracks
query: You have a supply of straight track pieces and 90‑degree curved pieces. Each piece occupies one grid cell and may be rotated. Find the maximum number of pieces that can be arranged to form a single non‑self‑intersecting closed loop on the square grid.

title: Quartets
query: Determine whether cheating could have occurred in a Quartets game based on the rules for asking and claiming cards.

title: Compression
query: For a binary string, repeatedly remove one of any two consecutive identical substrings to obtain the shortest possible string, and output that string.

title: Archaeological Recovery
query: From the list of all pyramid configurations achievable by unknown lever flips, reconstruct a set of lever effects (up to equivalence) that could generate those configurations.

title: Schedule
query: For n teams of two people, choose which member of each team works each of w weeks to minimize the maximum isolation, defined as the largest gap (including wrap‑around) between weeks any two members from different teams are simultaneously present.

title: A Recurring Problem
query: Enumerate positive linear recurrences ordered lexicographically by their infinite generated part (then by coefficients). Given an index N, output the recurrence (order, coefficients, initial terms) that corresponds to the Nth entry.

title: Tilting Tiles
query: Determine whether a start configuration of colored tiles on an h×w board can be transformed into a target configuration by repeatedly tilting the board in one of four directions, causing all tiles to slide until blocked.

title: Jet Lag
query: After sleeping k minutes you are rested k minutes, then able to function k minutes (during which you may sleep again). Starting at time 0 you must sleep immediately. Given a list of event times, determine a sequence of integer-length sleep intervals that lets you attend every event without missing any part.

title: Waterworld
query: For each of m longitudinal slices (each d degrees) the planet’s surface is divided into n equal‑height bands, and the water‑cover percentage of each band is given. Compute the overall percentage of the spherical surface covered by water.

title: Alea Iacta Est
query: You have several dice, each showing a set of symbols. You may keep any dice and reroll the rest each turn. Determine the expected number of rolls required, under an optimal keep/reroll strategy, to obtain a top‑face arrangement that can be formed into a valid dictionary word.

title: Billboards
query: Each sponsor has a continuous piecewise linear value function over the billboard length. Split the billboard into n contiguous sections (one per sponsor) so that each sponsor receives at least 1/n of their total value.

title: Bingo for the Win!
query: In Speed Bingo, n players each have a sheet of k numbers (with possible duplicates). Numbers are called in random order; when a number is called, the first player (by reaction speed) who still has that number crosses off one copy. Assuming uniform random call order, compute the probability that each player finishes last (i.e., completes their sheet after all others).

title: Citizenship
query: 给定居住要求 d 天和 y 年，以及旅行/在境内的历史记录。申请日往前数 y 个连续的 12 个月窗口，每个窗口都必须至少在国内 d 天；求最早可以提交申请的日期。

title: Doubles Horseback Wrestling
query: 有 n 名骑手，每名骑手的真实评分只知道在区间 [l_i, u_i] 内。若两名骑手的区间中能选出两个数加起来等于目标 s，就可以配对。求最多能组成多少对互不相交的骑手。

title: Flipping Container
query: 一个三边长度互异的长方体箱子要从起点移动到终点。每次只能沿当前底面的四条边之一翻转 90 度，方向会随之改变；求到达终点且姿态与初始相同的最少翻转次数。

title: Friendly Rivalry
query: 有 2n 个平面上的分会位置，需要把它们分成两个各有 n 个点的队。目标是让不同队之间最近的一对点的欧氏距离尽可能大。

title: Kindergarten
query: 每个小孩嫉妒一个其他小孩，也喜欢一个其他小孩。若 A 嫉妒 B、喜欢 C，且排队时 B 在 A 后面，同时 C 在 A 前面或 B 后面，A 就可能捣乱。求一个让所有小孩都不会捣乱的进入顺序。

title: Maxwell’s Demon
query: 一个矩形容器被中墙分成左右两室，粒子在两室内弹性反射。恶魔在中墙固定点可任意时刻决定让到达该点的粒子穿墙或反弹；求最早何时能让所有红色粒子在左室、蓝色粒子在右室。

title: Steppe on It
query: 村庄道路构成一棵树。给定可用消防车数量，需要在村庄设置消防站并分配车辆，使得任意村庄被消防车到达的最坏车程尽可能短。

title: The Silk Road . . . with Robots!
query: 一条直线上每天新增一个机器人或商店；每天新增前商店钱数恢复、机器人回到初始位置。当天机器人可移动到商店取钱，每个商店最多被取一次，收益为钱数减移动距离；求每天能获得的最大总收益。

title: Tower of noiHa
query: After k optimal Tower of Hanoi moves, the son illegally moves all disks from peg 1 to peg 3 in one move (preserving order). Determine the minimum number of further legal moves needed to complete the puzzle.

title: Where Am I Now?
query: On a known grid map with walls, you start at an unknown open cell facing an unknown direction. By moving and observing the distance to the nearest wall ahead each step, determine your exact cell and orientation.

title: APL Lives!
query: Implement an interpreter for a subset of APL with specific operators and evaluation rules.

title: Barcodes
query: Decode a Code-11 barcode, checking for correct check characters and valid bar widths.

title: Tracking Bio-bots
query: Count stuck squares in a grid where a robot can only move north or east, blocked by walls.

title: Castles
query: Find minimum army size to capture and defend all castles in a region with specific requirements.

title: Channel
query: Find longest non-intersecting channel in a grid with rocks, entering from top-left and exiting bottom-right.

title: Contour Mapping
query: Calculate total contour line length from elevation data using triangular terrain approximation.

title: The Islands
query: Given n islands with increasing x‑coordinates and two special islands that must be visited in different passes, find the shortest total length of a west‑to‑east pass followed by an east‑to‑west pass that visits every island, where each pass is monotone in x but may move arbitrarily in y. Output the length and the visiting order.

title: Rain
query: For a triangulated terrain with point heights, heavy rain fills all possible lakes up to their maximal levels (water can flow out at the boundary). Determine how many distinct lakes are formed and the water level (height) of each lake, outputting the levels in non‑decreasing order.

title: Robots on Ice
query: On an m×n grid, count the number of tours that start at (0,0), end at (0,1), visit every cell exactly once, and pass through three specified cells at prescribed times (⌊i·m·n/4⌋ for i=1,2,3). Output the count for each test case.

title: Sharing Chocolate
query: A chocolate bar is a rectangle divided into unit squares. Determine whether it can be recursively split along rows or columns into pieces whose sizes match a given multiset of requested counts for friends, i.e., whether the bar can be divided to satisfy all demands.

title: Paperweight
query: A paperweight consists of two tetrahedra sharing a face, with a chip inside. Find the minimum and maximum possible distances from the chip to the table when the paperweight rests on a face in a sufficiently stable position (center of mass may shift up to 0.2 units without tipping).

title: A-Skew-ed Reasoning
query: Given a binary min-heap-shaped skew heap containing the numbers 1 to n, decide whether it could have been produced by inserting these numbers in some order, and if yes output the lexicographically smallest and largest insertion permutations.

title: Blackboard Game
query: On numbers 1 to n, two players alternately move between numbers related by multiplying or dividing by a prime, erasing the previous number. The first move must choose an even number; determine whether the first player wins and give a winning first move if so.

title: Bride of Pipe Stream
query: A directed flow network has stations that may split incoming flow arbitrarily and ducts that pass flow onward in fixed proportions to lower stations or reservoirs. Choose station splits to maximize the minimum inflow received by any reservoir.

title: Buggy Rover
query: A rover moves on a grid by always taking the first passable direction in its current priority ordering of north, east, south, and west. Given its recorded move sequence, find the minimum possible number of times its priority ordering could have changed.

title: Delivery Service
query: Couriers travel between home and destination cities on fixed daily schedules and can carry or hand off packages only while in the same city at the same time. After each new courier is added, count unordered city pairs that can send packages to each other.

title: Herding Cats
query: There are m distinct plants and m pots in a row. Each cat likes some plant types and must stop at a specified pot, the first pot containing a liked plant. Decide whether the plants can be arranged so every cat stops at its desired pot.

title: Lava Moat
query: A triangulated rectangular terrain has distinct elevations at vertices and linearly interpolated elevations elsewhere. Find the shortest constant-elevation path connecting the western border to the eastern border.

title: Score Values
query: A score starts at 0 and can repeatedly increase by given amounts, capped at a maximum. Determine the minimum number of digit signs needed to display every score that can occur, with 6 signs also usable as 9 signs.

title: Slot Machine
query: 给定n个轮子的老虎机，每个轮子有n个不同符号，每次询问是否可以通过旋转轮子使所有符号相同，根据朋友每次操作后的不同符号数量判断。

title: Stacking Cups
query: 需要将高度为2i-1厘米的n个杯子堆叠，使总高度等于目标数，找到合适的堆叠顺序。

title: Treasure Map
query: 根据海图的深度数据，计算宝藏可能的最小深度，确保两种插值方法一致。

title: Walking on Sunshine
query: 在阳光方向下行走时避免眼睛疼痛，找到最短路径，考虑阴影区域。

title: A Careful Approach
query: 多组测试中，每组给出 n<=8 架飞机的可安全降落时间闭区间，要求安排所有飞机在各自区间内降落，并最大化相邻降落时间间隔的最小值，最后按分钟和秒输出这个最大化的最小间隔。

title: My Bad
query: 给定由 AND、OR、NOT、XOR 门组成的数字电路及多组输入输出观测，假设最多只有一个门可能以反相、恒 0 或恒 1 三种方式之一失效，需要判断电路是否正确；若观测显示错误，则尽可能确定唯一失效的门及其失效方式。

title: The Return of Carl
query: 在固定的正八面体纸镇表面，已知起点和终点的球坐标，求两点沿八面体表面的最短路径长度；多组测试直到结束标记。

title: Conduit Packing
query: 多组测试中，每组给出四根导线的直径，要求计算能同时容纳这四根导线的圆形导管的最小内径，并四舍五入到整数输出。

title: Fare and Balanced
query: 给定一个从路口 1 到路口 N 的无环有向道路网，每条边有行驶耗时。需要给若干道路设置正整数过路费，使得所有从 1 到 N 的路径总代价相同，且每条路径最多经过一条收费道路；在满足条件的前提下最小化这个共同代价，并输出收费方案和最终代价，或判断无解。

title: Deer-Proof Fence
query: 给定若干树苗及每棵树苗要求的最小保护距离，可以建一条或多条围栏，围栏可以是直线或曲线，且必须与树苗保持至少该距离。求保护所有树苗所需围栏总长度的最小值。

title: House of Cards
query: 给定一副按顺序抽牌的卡牌游戏：两名玩家轮流抽牌、可持有一张牌，并可用抽到的牌或持牌形成“地板”或“峰”，形成三角形时按多数颜色计分。游戏结束后持牌也会影响分数。对指定玩家，在双方都最优决策时，求该玩家最多能赢多少、最少输多少，或是否平局。

title: The Ministers' Major Mess
query: 给定若干议员对最多四个法案的 yes/no 意见，需要为每个法案决定通过或不通过，使得每位议员超过一半的意见被满足。判断是否存在这样的决定；若存在，再找出哪些法案的取值在所有可行决定中是唯一确定的。

title: Struts and Springs
query: 给定一个外层窗口、若干按输入顺序编号的内层窗口及其布局约束，并有多次调整外层窗口大小的操作。每次调整后，需要按编号输出所有内层窗口的新位置、宽度和高度。

title: Subway Timing
query: 给定一棵树形地铁图，以及相邻站点之间的真实通行时间（秒）。需要把每条边的时间估计为整数分钟，可向上或向下取整，使得任意两站之间沿路径的估计总时间与真实总时间的最大误差最小。

title: Suffix-Replacement Grammars
query: 给定起始字符串 S、若干等长的后缀替换规则，以及目标字符串 T。规则只能替换当前字符串的整个后缀。判断能否从 S 变成 T；若能，求最少需要应用多少条规则。
